message:
test(tui): add Unicode width coverage for text display primitives

Add 9 tests covering CJK double-width characters, emoji ZWJ sequences,
grapheme clusters, edge cases (empty, zero-width, width-1), and CJK
padding/truncation for fit_display, center_display, and command_hint_width.
These satisfy the bd-2bpl.3.6.5 acceptance criteria for Unicode width
test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
